transcript:
Agent: Hi, this is Cadence calling on behalf of Coastal Dental Care, NPI 1029387465, for benefits verification. Tax ID 73-9182746. Rep ID please?
Rep: Hi, Susan here, rep ID SU3318 with Cigna Dental.
Agent: Thanks Susan. Member is Olivia Martin, member ID CIG293847561, date of birth April 8 1990, group GRP110293.
Rep: One moment. Coverage is active. Plan is Cigna Dental PPO. Effective January 1 2024 through current date.
Agent: Annual maximum?
Rep: Two thousand dollars per calendar year, fifteen hundred dollars currently remaining.
Agent: Deductible?
Rep: Fifty dollars individual, met for 2026.
Agent: Coverage percentages?
Rep: Preventive one hundred percent, basic eighty percent, major fifty percent.
Agent: Could you give me the frequency limits for cleanings and exams?
Rep: I'm sorry, frequency details are not something I'm able to share over the phone. Please refer to the benefits booklet on the provider portal for full frequency details.
Agent: Understood. What about waiting periods on major services?
Rep: I don't have that information available. Please consult the portal.
Agent: Pre-auth requirements?
Rep: Recommended for major services. I cannot give specific dollar thresholds, again please refer to the portal.
Agent: Network status for our provider, NPI 1029387465?
Rep: Provider is in-network.
Agent: Thank you Susan.
Rep: Goodbye.
